text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's that most festive day of the year, and
apparently, Hishi Akebono has prepared a feast
for us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Knowing her, I have no doubt she's readied a
huge volume of scrumptious food.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since it's a special occasion, I buy some slightly
fancy soft drinks for us, then hurry back to the
academy under the winter sky.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, welcome back! I just finished preparing the
food!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I expect to see a huge earthenware pot on the
table, but instead, I see platters filled with things
like marinated foods, omelets, and cheese.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Are you surprised? This is called
"antipasto."

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's a type of Italian appetizer. Remember how my
family runs an Italian restaurant?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Well, I thought it would be fitting to have an
Italian-style feast to celebrate today!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Different dishes are arranged on plates, with each
one brought out in turn.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's really fun seeing everything brought out, so I
figured it'd be fun to try having a meal in that
style!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehe! You're welcome. Okay, shall we dig in? ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So starts the special dinner that Hishi Akebono
kindly prepared for us!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Next, for our primo piatto, we haaave cannelloni!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Cannelloni is a kind of pasta dish. It's a
holiday staple for my family.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The cheese might be a little hot, so maybe blow
on it before you eat it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: And for our secondo piatto, roast chicken! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
This is our main course today, so I've been
pouring all my effort into it since last night!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I cooked some veggies as side dishes for it, too.
They taste buono with the meat, so make sure
you try them!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Lastly, we have panettone for dessert! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's a classic dessert for any Italian winter
celebration! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The dried fruits make it sweet and buono! Let's
have some!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She cuts a slice of panettone for me and, after
taking a bite, I relish the sweet and mild taste as
it fills my mouth.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Mmmm! It really is buono! I love how sweet and fluffy it is!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad everything turned out tasty! Phew, I'm so
full! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After our meal, we sip on the drinks I bought and
sit together savoring the aftertaste of our dinner.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. I'm glad it was just the two of us today.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, I wasn't sure if I wanted to hold a
party today or not.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking it'd be fun to be with everyone, and
to have some hot pot, and share a biiig cake.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But then I thought about how I used to celebrate
the holidays quietly with just my parents.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
So I wanted to make today a day for relaxing and
creating wonderful memories with family.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That's why I thought it would be a good idea to
celebrate the holidays with you, privately.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: And it turns out I made the right choice! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Let's do this again next year, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Relaxing in peace, Hishi Akebono and I share a
precious and irreplaceable moment in time
together.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I hope I can spend the holidays with you like this
next year, and the year after that, too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I would be... Um...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Well, I'd be really happy if you felt the same way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I start to answer that I'd be happy to celebrate
the holiday together again, but before I can get
the words out...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I completely forgot! I haven't put the star on top
of the tree yet!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It was really hard, so I put it off, but then I totally
forgot.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Really? Yay! I'm counting on you, then!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The tree's really high, so you might not be able to
reach the top. Here, I'll lift you up.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: HUP!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She braces herself with a war cry, then hefts me
up in the blink of an eye.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Do you think you can reach it, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As she holds me firmly in both arms...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make a wish upon the star that Hishi Akebono
and I will be able to celebrate the holidays again
next year... then carefully place it atop the tree.
